name: Bonnie Rabbit and Rodent Food 750g
description: This complete, all-natural food blend is specially designed to meet the dietary needs of small animals like rabbits, guinea pigs, and hamsters. Enriched with high-quality ingredients such as clover pellets, grains, seeds, and legumes, it provides essential nutrients for healthy growth, energy, and vitality. Whether your pet is a curious rabbit, a playful guinea pig, or a busy hamster, this feed ensures they get a balanced diet to support their active lifestyle and long-term health. Key Features Complete & Balanced Nutrition – Provides all vital vitamins, minerals, and fiber for digestive health. High-Fiber Formula – Supports optimal digestion and prevents gastrointestinal issues. Natural Ingredients – Made with clover pellets, grains, seeds, and carob for natural taste and aroma. Energy Boosting – Rich in carbohydrates and proteins to keep your small pet active and playful. Healthy Skin & Fur – Omega-rich ingredients promote shiny coats and healthy skin. No Artificial Additives – Free from artificial colors, flavors, and preservatives. Ingredients Clover Pellets, Wheat, Barley, Oat, Corn, Sunflower Seeds, Peas, Carob. Feeding Recommendations Animal Daily Portion Equivalent in Tablespoons Rabbits 40–50 g 4–5 tbsp Guinea Pigs 35–40 g 3–4 tbsp Hamsters 10–15 g 1–1.5 tbsp Why Choose This Feed? Supports healthy teeth wear due to fibrous texture. Encourages natural foraging behavior with a mix of textures and flavors. Suitable for all breeds and ages of rabbits, guinea pigs, and hamsters.
